--- title: "177: Tetris" date: "2026-03-10" categories: - grid::textGrob format: html: code-fold: true code-summary: "Code" editor: visual --- ### Load data ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} library(rlang) library(cbbplotR) acc_champs <- readr::read_csv("acc-champs.csv") wab_data <- readr::read_csv("wab-data.csv") # save function gt_save_crop <- function(data, file = NULL, bg = "white", whitespace = 50, zoom = 2, expand = 5) { tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".png") # Wrap the gtsave_extra call in a tryCatch to handle errors tryCatch({ gtExtras::gtsave_extra(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand) }, error = function(e) { # If there's an error, try using regular gt::gtsave instead message("gtsave_extra failed, trying gt::gtsave...") gt::gtsave(data, tmp, zoom = zoom, expand = expand) }) magick::image_read(tmp) |> magick::image_trim() |> magick::image_border(bg, glue::glue('{whitespace}x{whitespace}')) |> magick::image_write(file) unlink(tmp) } ``` ::: ### ACC Tournament table ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} team_colors <- tibble::tribble( ~team, ~color, "Duke", "#003087", "North Carolina", "#56a0d3", "NC State", "#CC0000", "Wake Forest", "#9E7E38", "Georgia Tech", "#B3A369", "Virginia", "#E57200", "Florida State", "#782F40", "Maryland", "#E03A3E", "Miami", "#F47321", "Notre Dame", "#AE9142", "South Carolina", "#73000A", "Virginia Tech", "#861F41" ) acc_champs <- dplyr::bind_rows( acc_champs, tibble::tibble( year = 1954:1959, team = c("NC State", "NC State", "NC State", "North Carolina", "Maryland", "NC State") ) ) acct_logos <- acc_champs |> cbbplotR::gt_cbb_teams(team, team, include_name = FALSE) |> dplyr::mutate(decade = paste0(floor(year / 10) * 10, "s")) |> dplyr::group_by(decade) |> dplyr::mutate(col_name = paste0("year_", dplyr::row_number())) |> dplyr::ungroup() |> tidyr::pivot_wider(id_cols = decade, names_from = col_name, values_from = team) |> dplyr::mutate( decade = factor( decade, levels = c("2020s", "2010s", "2000s", "1990s", "1980s", "1970s", "1960s", "1950s") ), year_10 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_6, year_10), year_9 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_5, year_9), year_8 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_4, year_8), year_7 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_3, year_7), year_6 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_2, year_6), year_5 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_1, year_5), year_4 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_4), year_3 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_3), year_2 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_2), year_1 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_1) ) |> dplyr::arrange(decade) accwide <- acc_champs |> dplyr::mutate(decade = paste0(floor(year / 10) * 10, "s")) |> dplyr::group_by(decade) |> dplyr::mutate(col_name = paste0("year_", dplyr::row_number())) |> dplyr::ungroup() |> tidyr::pivot_wider(id_cols = decade, names_from = col_name, values_from = team) |> dplyr::mutate( decade = factor( decade, levels = c("2020s", "2010s", "2000s", "1990s", "1980s", "1970s", "1960s", "1950s") ), year_10 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_6, year_10), year_9 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_5, year_9), year_8 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_4, year_8), year_7 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_3, year_7), year_6 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_2, year_6), year_5 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", year_1, year_5), year_4 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_4), year_3 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_3), year_2 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_2), year_1 = dplyr::if_else(decade == "1950s", NA_character_, year_1) ) |> dplyr::arrange(decade) acct_header <- glue::glue( "
ACC Tournament Champions
1954–2025 Shows the ACC Tournament Champion for each season since 1954.

" ) year_cols <- dplyr::select(accwide, dplyr::starts_with("year")) get_team_locations <- \(team_name) { purrr::map(seq_len(ncol(year_cols)), \(col_i) { rows <- which(year_cols[[col_i]] == team_name) if (length(rows) == 0) return(NULL) gt::cells_body(rows = rows, columns = col_i + 1L) }) |> purrr::compact() } acct_logos[1, "year_1"] <- paste0( "", acct_logos[1, "year_1"], "" ) acct_tbl <- acct_logos |> gt::gt() |> gt::fmt_markdown(columns = c(gt::starts_with("year"))) |> gtUtils::gt_theme_savant() |> gt::tab_header(title = gt::html(acct_header)) |> gt::cols_label_with(columns = gt::starts_with("year"), fn = \(x) "") |> gt::cols_label(decade = "") |> gt::sub_missing(columns = gt::starts_with("year"), missing_text = "") |> gt::tab_source_note( source_note = gt::html( "
Programs with at least 3 ACC Tournament Titles:
23....Duke
18....North Carolina
11....NC State
4.....Wake Forest, Georgia Tech
3.....Virginia
2020 ACC Tournament ended early due to COVID-19, Florida State declared winner
Data from wikipedia.com and theme from {gtUtils}
2026 ACC Tournament begins Tuesday, March 10 in Charlotte, NC
Table by Chris at Bless your chart | March 10, 2026" ) ) |> gt::tab_style( style = list(gt::cell_borders( sides = c("left", "right", "bottom"), color = "black", weight = gt::px(2) )), locations = list( gt::cells_body(), gt::cells_column_labels(), gt::cells_row_groups() ) ) |> gt::tab_options(column_labels.hidden = TRUE) |> gt::tab_style( style = gt::cell_borders( sides = "top", color = "black", weight = gt::px(2) ), locations = gt::cells_body(rows = 1) ) |> (\(tbl) { purrr::reduce(seq_len(nrow(team_colors)), \(tbl, i) { gt::tab_style( tbl, style = gt::cell_fill(color = team_colors$color[i], alpha = 0.25), locations = get_team_locations(team_colors$team[i]) ) }, .init = tbl) })() gt_save_crop(acct_tbl, file = "acct_tbl.png", whitespace = 60, bg = "white") ``` ::: ### WABStick tetris ::: {.cell} ```{.r .cell-code} plot_wabstick_six <- function( wab_data, teams, color_pos = "#1a9850", color_neg = "lightpink", ncol = 2 ) { if (length(teams) != 4) { rlang::abort("`teams` must be a character vector of exactly six team names.") } # 1. Data Preparation plot_data <- wab_data |> dplyr::filter( team %in% teams, game_type == "played", is.na(type) | type != "nond1", !is.na(wab), !is.na(bub_win_prob) ) # 2. Summary stats for the strip labels team_summaries <- plot_data |> dplyr::summarise( wins = sum(result == "W", na.rm = TRUE), losses = sum(result == "L", na.rm = TRUE), total_wab = sum(wab, na.rm = TRUE), .by = team ) |> dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(total_wab)) |> dplyr::mutate( strip_label = sprintf("%s (%d-%d, %+.2f WAB)", team, wins, losses, total_wab) ) # 3. Join and Factorize for consistent ordering plot_data <- plot_data |> dplyr::left_join(team_summaries, by = "team") |> dplyr::mutate( strip_label = factor(strip_label, levels = team_summaries$strip_label), bar_fill = dplyr::if_else(wab >= 0, color_pos, color_neg) ) # 4. Alpha Scaling max_wab_val <- max(abs(plot_data$wab), na.rm = TRUE) plot_data$bar_alpha <- scales::rescale(abs(plot_data$wab), to = c(0.4, 1), from = c(0, max_wab_val)) # Plot Parameters bar_width <- 0.009 wab_limit <- ceiling(max(abs(plot_data$wab), 0.5) * 2) / 2 # 5. The Plot ggplot2::ggplot(plot_data) + ggplot2::geom_rect( ggplot2::aes( xmin = bub_win_prob - bar_width, xmax = bub_win_prob + bar_width, ymin = 0, ymax = wab, fill = bar_fill, alpha = bar_alpha ), color = "white", linewidth = 0.1 ) + ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.8, color = "gray20") + ggplot2::geom_hline(yintercept = c(-0.5, 0.5), linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.3, color = "gray60") + ggplot2::geom_vline(xintercept = 0.5, linetype = "dotted", linewidth = 0.4, color = "gray60") + ggplot2::scale_fill_identity() + ggplot2::scale_alpha_identity() + ggplot2::scale_x_reverse( labels = scales::label_percent(), breaks = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1), expand = c(0.05, 0.05) ) + ggplot2::scale_y_continuous( limits = c(-wab_limit, wab_limit), breaks = seq(-wab_limit, wab_limit, by = 0.5), labels = scales::label_number(accuracy = 0.1) ) + ggplot2::coord_flip() + ggplot2::facet_wrap(~ strip_label, ncol = ncol) + ggplot2::labs( title = "R\u00e9sum\u00e9 Tetris
Wins-Above-Bubble", subtitle = "Right is positive WAB (wins), left is negative WAB (losses).
Toughest games towards top and easier games towards bottom.", x = "<--- Easier Games | Harder Games --->", y = "<--- Negative WAB | Positive WAB --->", caption = "Data via barttorvik.com through March 9 games
Only games against D-I opponents are surfaced

Viz by Chris at Bless your chart" ) + hrbrthemes::theme_ipsum_rc(grid = "XY") + ggplot2::theme( plot.title = ggtext::element_markdown(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", size = 16), plot.subtitle = ggtext::element_markdown(hjust = 0.5, size = 10, margin = ggplot2::margin(b = 15)), plot.caption = ggtext::element_markdown(), strip.background = ggplot2::element_rect(fill = "gray92", color = NA), strip.text = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"), panel.spacing = ggplot2::unit(1.5, "lines"), axis.title.x = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, color = "gray30", hjust = 0.5), axis.title.y = ggplot2::element_text(size = 9, color = "gray30", hjust = 0.5) ) } # Usage teams <- c( "Miami OH", "Auburn", "Virginia Tech", "Santa Clara" ) four_plot <- plot_wabstick_six( wab_data, teams = teams ) ggplot2::ggsave("four_plot.png", four_plot, h = 11.5, w = 8.5, dpi = 600, bg = "white", type = "cairo") four_plot ``` ::: {.cell-output-display} ![](byc_177_tetris_acct_files/figure-html/wab-tetris-1.png){width=672} ::: :::
